rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees On Appeal A164470
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 1, 2024 line 1. PLAINTIFF DALE DUNCAN, MARTA MUNOZ MENDOZA, BRIAN SMYTH, BEN HUTCHINSON MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES ON APPEAL A164470 is GRANTED as requested in the amount of $30,660. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ANA MACDONALD VS. DUKE PARTNERS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 1, 2024 line 2. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC, WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION TO DISMISS is continued to March 13, 2024 for the moving party to fully comply with the Court's prior minute order. No later than March 5, 2024 by 9:00 a.m. moving party to provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers with portions of the brief and declaration referencing May 11, 2023 ruling on prior Motion to Dismiss and compliance with that ruling highlighted and tabbed. These copies must be accompanied by a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court received what appears to be a new set of courtesy copies with some highlights (no tabs to identify whether all highlights were seen). It is not clear whether the new set was responsive to the Court's request as the highlights that have been seen did not address the Court's request. New copies must include the highlights and each page with a highlight must be tabbed. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
